title: Resume Example
subtitle: Resume or CV with data-first bullets.

sections.heading: Resume in use
sections.body: This resume example uses structured achievements and capability groups rather than a blank profile shell.

cards.title: VPK HTML Skill

cards.title: Quality

rows: Rendered accessible single-file HTML from structured payloads
Aligned offline theme values with VPK semantic tokens
Guarded generated examples against placeholder regressions
